# dynamodb-toolkit-express

> Express adapter for `dynamodb-toolkit` v3. Mounts the toolkit's standard REST route pack as Express middleware.

**Status:** scaffolding. API below is provisional.

## Install

```sh
npm install dynamodb-toolkit-express dynamodb-toolkit express
```

## Quick start

```js
import express from 'express';
import {Adapter} from 'dynamodb-toolkit';
import {createExpressAdapter} from 'dynamodb-toolkit-express';

const adapter = new Adapter({client, table: 'planets', keyFields: ['name']});
const app = express();
app.use(express.json());
app.use('/planets', createExpressAdapter(adapter));
app.listen(3000);
```

## Links

- Parent toolkit: https://github.com/uhop/dynamodb-toolkit
- Sibling (Koa): https://github.com/uhop/dynamodb-toolkit-koa
- Route pack reference: https://github.com/uhop/dynamodb-toolkit/wiki/HTTP-handler
